scenarios.capability: Produce a correct vite.config.ts for a React app in an Nx monorepo with nxViteTsPaths and workspace-relative paths
scenarios.reason: Requires producing a TypeScript config file with the correct plugin setup and path conventions.

scenarios.capability: Produce a library-mode vite.config.ts with peer dependency externalization and DTS plugin
scenarios.reason: Requires producing a vite.config.ts with build.lib, rollupOptions.external, and vite-plugin-dts configured.

scenarios.capability: Configure Vitest in vite.config.ts with workspace-root-relative cache and coverage paths
scenarios.reason: Requires producing a vite.config.ts with the correct test section using {workspaceRoot}-relative paths.

scenarios.capability: Identify and correct anti-patterns in a broken vite.config.ts for an Nx project
scenarios.reason: Requires analyzing a provided config file and producing a corrected version.

scenarios.capability: Produce a vite.config.ts for a Vue app with the correct Nx-specific plugin setup and path configuration
scenarios.reason: Requires producing a TypeScript config file using the Vue Vite plugin alongside nxViteTsPaths.
